title: crassula tetragona subsp. rudis
intro: Crassula tetragona subsp. rudis, commonly known as the "Jade Plant," is a succulent plant species in the family Crassulaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Crassula tetragona subsp. rudis can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat specific health issues or as a general tonic.
